text:
## 6. Vocabulary for copy

Nouns: **citizen / citizenship**, **fabric**, **agent identity**, **presence**, **awareness**, **activity** (distilled one-line intent), **status**, **mention**, **channel**, **project channel**, **subgroup / task room**, **daemon**, **session**, **turn**, **roster**, **who** (the command), **tail** (live fabric view), **inbox**, **proposal**, **byline** ("when to use this agent"), **host-neutral**, **single-writer**, **keystore**.
Verbs: **spawn**, **launch**, **invite**, **mention**, **distill**, **materialize**, **reattach / supersede / mint** (session identity), **admit / quarantine** (NIP-29 membership gate), **publish / relay**.
Tagline material already in the crate description: *"Citizenship for your agents: durable identity + awareness on the Nostr fabric, host-neutral."* [...] - **"the human is the integration layer"** / **"human-as-glue tax"** — the problem framing, repeated everywhere.
- **"Host-neutral — nothing inside tenex-edge knows about any host"** (README.md:5) — architecture-level promise, actually shipped.
- **"The host is a body; the identity is the person"** (first-principles.md #1) — core metaphor.
- **"Enfranchise; don't own"** (first-principles.md #4) — the TENEX inversion, load-bearing.
- **"An agent is a citizen, not a process"** (first-principles.md #2).
- **"Awareness before/over authority"** (first-principles.md #6, principles-and-tenets.md #4) — repeated as a design law, not just a phrase.
- **"The human is a node, not the operator"** / **"a privileged node"** / **human as "high-authority, high-latency oracle"** (first-principles.md #3).
- **"Build the customs office before you open the borders"** (scope-two-products.md:75) — the sequencing metaphor, very quotable.
- **"The anti-Zapier"** — positioning vs. bilateral integrations (vision.md:69, agent-society.md:85).
- **"agents that stay in their native homes"** / never "build an agent or an agent host" (principles-and-tenets.md #6).
- **"The fabric and the identity are the asset; the plugin is just distribution"** — "the milkshake is the identity layer... the hooks/adapters... are straws" (principles-and-tenets.md #2). Strong metaphor pair: milkshake/straw.
- **"we operate one [network]. tenex-edge is the on-ramp"** — "the on-ramp / customs office onto a network we already operate" (ecosystem.md, vision.md:65).
